items.situation: spring academic symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: Good afternoon, members. I'm thrilled to announce that the Linguistics Society's Spring Symposium will take place next Thursday at 3 p.m. in Harmon Hall, Room 210. Because seating is limited to forty attendees, you'll need to reserve a spot through our online portal by this Monday. Please note that this year's sessions assume familiarity with phonological theory, so we ask that you complete the two preparatory readings beforehand. Presenters from three visiting universities will discuss cutting-edge research, and light refreshments will follow. Don't miss this chance to engage with the scholars shaping our field.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a symposium with limited seats
options.B: To assign preparatory readings to members
options.C: To recruit presenters for a conference
options.D: To cancel this year's symposium sessions

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：整段的核心是宣布春季研讨会的时间、地点及有限座位并请成员预约，A准确概括了主旨。B错在too_narrow：预备阅读只是其中一个细节，不是整体目的。C错在wrong_purpose：演讲者来自三所大学但公告并非在招募演讲者。D错在reversed_intent：研讨会是要举办而非取消，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the symposium's intended audience?

options.A: Only graduate students are permitted to attend
options.B: It excludes presenters from visiting universities
options.C: It targets students with some linguistics background
options.D: It is mainly a networking reception

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告说明会议内容假定听众熟悉音系理论并要求完成预备阅读，可推断目标听众是有一定语言学基础的人。A错在over_inference：公告从未限定只有研究生才能参加，属过度推断。B错在wrong_detail：来访大学的演讲者正是受邀者，说法与事实相反。D错在unrelated_inference：虽有茶点，但公告重点是学术研讨而非社交招待会，推断偏离主题。

items.announcement: We're excited to announce that three new bike-share stations will open across campus this Monday. You'll find them outside the Recreation Center, near the east entrance of the library, and beside the Morrison dining hall. Each station will hold twenty bikes, and rentals can be unlocked using the campus mobility app. Please remember to return bikes to any official station within two hours to avoid additional fees. The existing station at the student union will remain in service as well. We hope these additions make getting around campus faster and greener.

questions.stem: Where will one of the new bike-share stations be located?

options.C: Next to the campus parking garage

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告明确列出新站点之一位于Morrison餐厅旁边。A错在wrong_detail：站点在Recreation Center外面而非大厅内部，改动了关键事实。C错在related_but_not_stated：停车楼是合理的校园地点，但公告中从未提及。D错在misattributed_detail：学生活动中心的站点是原有站点，被错误地归为新站点。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the two-hour return rule?

options.A: Bikes are tracked by GPS at all times
options.B: The app is free for first-year students
options.C: Returns are only allowed at Morrison hall
options.D: It keeps bikes available for other riders

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：要求两小时内归还并会产生额外费用，可推断此规则是为了让车辆快速周转、供其他人使用。A错在over_inference：公告未提GPS追踪，属过度推断。B错在unrelated_inference：应用免费与否与该规则无关，且公告未提。C错在wrong_detail：公告说可归还到任意官方站点，而非只有Morrison，与事实相反。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the honors thesis oral defenses for the History Department will be held next Wednesday in Caldwell Hall, Room 105. Each student has been assigned a thirty-minute slot between 9 a.m. and 4 p.m., and you'll find the full schedule posted outside the department office. Candidates should arrive at least fifteen minutes early and bring three printed copies of their thesis for the committee. Family and friends are welcome to attend as observers. We wish all our graduating students the very best of luck.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit committee members for defenses
options.B: To describe where copies should be printed
options.C: To inform students about the defense schedule
options.D: To postpone the scheduled oral defenses

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告告知荣誉论文答辩的时间、地点、时段安排及注意事项，主旨是通知答辩日程。A错在wrong_purpose：委员会已就位，公告并非招募委员。B错在too_narrow：打印副本只是一个细节要求，不是整体目的。D错在reversed_intent：答辩是按计划举行而非延期，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What must candidates bring to their defense?

options.A: Three printed copies of their thesis
options.B: A digital copy on a flash drive
options.C: A signed permission form from advisors
options.D: The posted schedule from the office

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告要求候选人为委员会带三份打印的论文副本。B错在wrong_detail：公告说的是打印副本而非U盘电子版，改动了关键事实。C错在related_but_not_stated：导师签字表在校园里合理，但公告从未提及。D错在misattributed_detail：张贴的日程是供查阅的，被错误地当成需携带的物品。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Due to construction on Maple Avenue, the campus shuttle's Blue Line route will change starting this Monday. For the next three weeks, the shuttle will no longer stop at the Fine Arts building; instead, it will use a temporary stop near the Wellness Center. Buses will continue to run every fifteen minutes from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. on weekdays. Please check the updated route map posted at each shuttle stop and on the transportation website. We're sorry for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience during the repairs.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce an entirely new shuttle line
options.B: To list the shuttle's daily operating hours
options.C: To add a stop at the Fine Arts building
options.D: To explain a temporary shuttle route change

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：因施工，Blue Line路线临时改道，公告主旨是说明这一临时路线变更。A错在wrong_purpose：这是现有线路改道而非开设全新线路。B错在too_narrow：运营时间只是一个细节，不是整体目的。C错在reversed_intent：公告是取消Fine Arts站点而非新增，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What is true about the shuttle service during construction?

options.A: Buses will run every thirty minutes
options.B: Buses continue running every fifteen minutes
options.C: Rides will be free during the repairs
options.D: The Fine Arts stop moves permanently

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告说班车在工作日仍每十五分钟一班。A错在wrong_detail：把十五分钟改成三十分钟，篡改了关键数字。C错在related_but_not_stated：免费乘车合理但公告未提。D错在misattributed_detail：Fine Arts站点只是三周内临时停用，被错误地说成永久迁移。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The campus bookstore will relocate from Harding Hall to the newly renovated Commons building on March 20th. During the move, the store will close for two days, reopening at its new location on March 22nd at 9 a.m. The Commons location will offer expanded hours and a dedicated section for used textbooks. Online orders will continue without interruption throughout the transition. Please note that all textbook rentals due this month can now be returned at the customer service desk in the Commons. We're confident you'll enjoy the larger, brighter space.

questions.stem: Where will the bookstore be located after the move?
questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告明确说书店将迁至新翻修的Commons大楼。B错在wrong_detail：Harding Hall是原址而非新址，且并无扩建侧翼一说。C错在related_but_not_stated：图书馆是合理地点但公告从未提及。D错在misattributed_detail：客服台是归还租书的地方，被错误当成书店新址。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about shopping during the two-day closure?

options.A: The store will process refunds only
options.B: All physical stores on campus will close
options.C: Students can still order books online
options.D: Textbook prices will rise after moving

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告说在过渡期间网上订购不受影响，可推断关店两天期间学生仍能在线购书。A错在wrong_detail：公告未说只办退款，篡改了事实。B错在over_inference：只有书店搬迁，推断全校实体店都关闭属过度推断。D错在unrelated_inference：涨价缺乏任何依据，且与搬迁无关。
